---
title: "REDCap_Master_Script"
author: "Nikolai Vukov"
date: "2026-07-23"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Background

```{r}

Directory<-getwd()

#Select where the input digitized charts are stored
PDF_File_Path<-" "

#Initial setup script
source("R_Setup_Script.R") #establishes API key for data upload:
```

# Excel

```{r}
#Select where the input excel sheets are stored
Excel_File_Path<-"C:/Users/nvuko/CBOTH_Summer_2026/REDCap/Input Sheets"

source("R_Script_Excel.R")
```

# PDF
